entity.name: Loan

many-to-one.name: currency
many-to-one.title: Currency
many-to-one.help: Currency of the loan; its number of decimals drives the amounts scale.

many-to-one.name: loanManagementConfig
many-to-one.title: Loan configuration
many-to-one.help: Loan configuration providing the journal and accounts copied on validation.

integer.name: computationModeSelect
integer.title: Computation mode
integer.help:
Constant payment: fixed installment, capital share grows over time.
Constant capital: fixed capital repayment, decreasing installment.
In fine: interest only until the last installment which repays the whole capital.

string.name: scheduleSnapshot
string.title: Schedule snapshot
string.help: Copy of the planned installments taken before a deferral, used to cancel it.

integer.name: deferralInstallmentCount
integer.title: Defer (installments)
integer.help: Number of upcoming installments to defer.

boolean.name: deferralCapitalizeInterest
boolean.title: Interest added to remaining debt
boolean.help: If yes, the interest of the deferred installments is added to the remaining debt.

boolean.name: deferralRecomputePayment
boolean.title: Recompute installments
boolean.help: If yes, the installments are recomputed to include the deferred interest; otherwise the original installments are kept.

boolean.name: deferralKeepInsurance
boolean.title: Keep insurance
boolean.help: If yes, the insurance stays due during the deferred installments.
